# Templates Phase 19C — VR Response Header-Composition Override Contract\n\n## Baseline\n\n- Phase 19B lock: `templates-phase19b-vr-response-source-import-readiness-20260623`.\n- Runtime mutation: `false`.\n- DOCX mutation: `false`.\n\n## Corrected decision\n\nInitial Billing Letter does not contain a DOCX header part. Its approved header comes from the shared letterhead/header asset composition layer with a template-specific override. Therefore, VR Response must use that same composition/override mechanism, not a copied block from Initial Billing Letter.\n\n## VR Response header/contact requirement\n\n- Template id: `vr-response`.\n- Mechanism: same shared letterhead/header asset composition mechanism as Initial Billing Letter.\n- Scope: template-specific override for `vr-response` only.\n- `445 Broadhollow Road | Suite CL18`\n- `Melville, New York 11747`\n- `Tel: (631) 210-7272`\n- `Fax: (516) 706-5055`\n- `Email: info@brlfirm.com`\n\n## Preservation rules\n\n- Preserve `templates/docx/letters/vr-response.docx` body content and hard-coded `Angelo F. Rizzo, Esquire` signature/signature image.\n- Runtime signer selection required: `false`.\n- Do not modify `templates/docx/letters/initial-billing-letter.docx`.\n- Do not modify `templates/docx/base/letterhead-simple.docx`.\n- Do not add legacy-token compatibility layers.\n\n## Target inspection\n\n- `src/lib/templates/template-layout-composition-registry-source.mjs`\n  -
